full_text:
Xu He 徐和
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu He (徐和). Caused chaos in Qing, took a large force led by Xiahou Yuan several battles to defeat Xu He. Xu He was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Xu He lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
